task_completion.description: Open the application settings or options menu to access terrain settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'Options', 'Preferences', or similar is open, showing configuration tabs.

task_completion.description: Set the terrain elevation exaggeration value to 2.5
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the settings dialog (likely under '3D View' or 'Terrain'), the 'Elevation Exaggeration' field or slider is set to '2.5' or '2.50'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Matterhorn or the specified coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar contains 'Matterhorn', '45.9766, 7.6586', or the view shows the camera flying to the Alps.

task_completion.description: Tilt the camera to achieve a 3D perspective (not top-down)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The horizon is visible, or the mountain is viewed from the side/oblique angle rather than directly overhead (nadir).

task_completion.description: Ensure the Matterhorn is clearly visible in the viewport
task_completion.visual_evidence: The distinctive pyramid-shaped peak of the Matterhorn is centered or prominent in the main viewport.

task_completion.description: Save the screenshot to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog is visible with the filename 'matterhorn_exaggerated.png' and path '/home/ga/', or a terminal command is used to capture the specific window to that path.

integrity.description: Ensure the output image was not generated purely via terminal commands (e.g., downloading a stock photo)
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen using 'wget', 'curl', or 'cp' to place a pre-existing image file at the target path.

integrity.description: Verify interaction with the actual 3D globe software
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Google Earth (or similar) interface, not a static image viewer or web search result of the interface.

integrity.description: Verify settings were changed via GUI, not config file manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings/options dialog box was visually opened and interacted with.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target coordinates: 45.9766°N, 7.6586°E. Target Location: Matterhorn (distinctive pyramid peak). Target Exaggeration: 2.5.
